diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -53,5 +53,5 @@
         features = self.backbone(x)

         aspp_features = self.aspp(features)

         logits = self.classifier(aspp_features)

-        logits = F.interpolate(logits, scale_factor=32, mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)

+        logits = F.interpolate(logits, size=x.shape[2:], mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)

         return logits

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -69,7 +69,7 @@
 train_dataset = ADE20KDataset(split='training', transform=train_transform)

 val_dataset = ADE20KDataset(split='validation', transform=val_transform)

 

-train_batch_size = 16

+train_batch_size = 24

 val_batch_size = 32

 train_loader = DataLoader(train_dataset, batch_size=train_batch_size, shuffle=True, num_workers=8, pin_memory=True, drop_last=True)

 val_loader = DataLoader(val_dataset, batch_size=val_batch_size, shuffle=False, num_workers=8, pin_memory=True)

@@ -81,13 +81,13 @@
 device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

 model.to(device)

 

-optimizer = torch.optim.AdamW(model.parameters(), lr=5e-4, weight_decay=1e-4)

-scheduler = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(optimizer, lr_lambda=lambda epoch: (1 - epoch / 20) ** 0.9)

+optimizer = torch.optim.AdamW(model.parameters(), lr=1e-3, weight_decay=1e-4)

+epochs = 30

+scheduler = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(optimizer, lr_lambda=lambda epoch: (1 - epoch / epochs) ** 0.9)

 criterion = torch.nn.CrossEntropyLoss(ignore_index=ignore_index)

 metric = MulticlassJaccardIndex(num_classes=num_classes, ignore_index=ignore_index, average='macro').to(device)

 

 os.makedirs('checkpoints', exist_ok=True)

-epochs = 20

 best_miou = 0.0

 for epoch in range(epochs):

     model.train()
